patient_summary: 73-year-old female (records include a conflicting legal sex entry of 'Male'). Primary documented diagnoses include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, postoperative/unspecified anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major planned/recorded procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (provider Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key abnormal laboratory findings from 07/03/2023: Ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), Iron 41 ug/dL (L), Iron Saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L), Triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), VLDL 32 mg/dL (H). Medication activity includes an Atorvastatin refill request. Multiple functional assessments document difficulty walking; responses about dressing/bathing conflict across notes. Multiple care teams listed including primary care and specialty providers at Singing River and Piedmont.
